mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE business_id = #{businessId} AND payment_status = 'PAID'

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.kit_id, oi.quantity, oi.price, COALESCE(k.name, '개인거래 상품') AS product_name, k.main_image1 AS image_url FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'PENDING' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.delivery_status, o.accept_status, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.customer_id, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, cr.room_id FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cr.bid_id = o.bid_id AND cr.business_id = o.business_id AND cr.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.business_id = #{businessId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND o.bid_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE business_id = #{businessId} AND payment_status = 'PAID' AND accept_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND bid_id IS NOT NULL
